title.en: Restriction of the use of certain hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment

standards.scope: Restricts use of hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, plus 4 phthalates) in EEE
standards.abstract: Restricts the use of certain hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment to protect human health and the environment.

title.en: Registration, Evaluation, Authorisation and Restriction of Chemicals

standards.scope: Chemical substance registration, evaluation, authorisation and restriction for protection of human health and environment
standards.abstract: Establishes procedures for registration, evaluation, authorisation and restriction of chemicals to ensure a high level of protection of human health and the environment.

title.en: Classification, Labelling and Packaging of Substances and Mixtures

standards.scope: Classification, labelling and packaging of chemical substances and mixtures; CMR substance classification
standards.abstract: Sets requirements for classification, labelling and packaging of chemical substances and mixtures to inform users about hazards.

standards.scope: Collection, recycling and recovery of waste electrical and electronic equipment
standards.abstract: Sets collection, recycling and recovery targets for all types of waste electrical and electronic equipment.

title.en: Basic safety standards for protection against the dangers arising from exposure to ionising radiation

standards.scope: Basic safety standards for ionising radiation protection
standards.abstract: Lays down basic safety standards for protection against the dangers arising from exposure to ionising radiation.

title.en: Regulation concerning batteries and waste batteries, amending Directive 2008/98/EC and Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, repealing Directive 2006/66/EC

standards.scope: Sustainability and safety requirements for batteries in medical devices
standards.abstract: Establishes sustainability and safety requirements for batteries placed on the EU market, including those used in medical devices.

title.en: Concerning particular requirements as regards the requirements laid down in Council Directives 90/385/EEC and 93/42/EEC with respect to active implantable medical devices and medical devices manufactured utilising tissues of animal origin

standards.scope: Particular requirements for devices utilizing tissues of animal origin (TSE risk)
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for medical devices using animal-origin tissues regarding TSE (transmissible spongiform encephalopathy) risk management.

title.en: Regulation on horizontal cybersecurity requirements for products with digital elements (CRA)

standards.scope: Horizontal cybersecurity requirements for products with digital elements
standards.abstract: Establishes horizontal cybersecurity requirements for products with digital elements placed on the EU market.

title.en: Directive on measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union (NIS 2 Directive)

standards.scope: Measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union
standards.abstract: Establishes measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the EU, affecting operators of essential and important entities.

title.en: Regulation laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence (Artificial Intelligence Act)

standards.scope: Harmonised rules on artificial intelligence - requirements for high-risk AI systems
standards.abstract: Lays down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence, including requirements for high-risk AI systems in medical devices.

standards.scope: General product safety regulation - baseline safety for consumer products
standards.abstract: Establishes general product safety requirements for consumer products placed on the EU market.

title.en: Regulation establishing a framework for setting ecodesign requirements for sustainable products (Ecodesign for Sustainable Products Regulation)

standards.scope: Ecodesign requirements for sustainable products framework
standards.abstract: Establishes a framework for ecodesign requirements for sustainable products, including energy-related and non-energy-related products.

title.en: Regulation on packaging and packaging waste, amending Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 and Directive (EU) 2019/904, and repealing Directive 94/62/EC

standards.scope: Packaging and packaging waste regulation - sustainability requirements
standards.abstract: Sets requirements for packaging and packaging waste management, including sustainability and labelling requirements.

title.en: Radio Equipment Directive - harmonisation of the laws of the Member States relating to the making available on the market of radio equipment

standards.scope: Radio equipment directive - essential requirements for radio equipment
standards.abstract: Harmonises the laws relating to the making available on the market of radio equipment, setting essential requirements.

title.en: Regulation on machinery and repealing Directive 2006/42/EC

standards.scope: Machinery regulation replacing Directive 2006/42/EC - safety of machinery
standards.abstract: Establishes health and safety requirements for machinery placed on the EU market, replacing Directive 2006/42/EC.

title.en: Directive on the Community code relating to medicinal products for human use

standards.scope: Community code relating to medicinal products for human use
standards.abstract: Establishes the Community code relating to medicinal products for human use, covering authorisation, manufacturing, and distribution.

title.en: Directive on the resilience of critical entities

standards.scope: Resilience of critical entities - risk assessments and measures
standards.abstract: Establishes rules to enhance the resilience of critical entities providing essential services in the EU.
